mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM RESTAURANT_TBL
rest_name >= '가' AND rest_name < '나'
rest_name >= '나' AND rest_name < '다'
rest_name >= '다' AND rest_name < '라'
rest_name >= '라' AND rest_name < '마'
rest_name >= '마' AND rest_name < '바'
rest_name >= '바' AND rest_name < '사'
rest_name >= '사' AND rest_name < '아'
rest_name >= '아' AND rest_name < '자'
rest_name >= '자' AND rest_name < '차'
rest_name >= '차' AND rest_name < '카'
rest_name >= '카' AND rest_name < '타'
rest_name >= '타' AND rest_name < '파'
rest_name >= '파' AND rest_name < '하'
rest_name >= '하' AND rest_name < '힣'
1 = 0
ORDER BY rest_name ASC
SELECT * FROM RESTAURANT_TBL WHERE rest_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN rest_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, rest_name ASC
SELECT MENU_NO, REST_NO, MENU_NAME AS name, MENU_PRICE AS price, CONCAT('http://localhost:9999/menu/', MENU_IMG) AS imagePreview FROM MENU_TBL WHERE REST_NO = #{restNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MENU_TBL ( REST_NO, MENU_NAME, MENU_PRICE, MENU_IMG ) VALUES ( #{restNo}, #{menuName}, #{menuPrice}, #{menuImg} )
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_ROUTE_TBL (from_tsche_no, to_tsche_no, transit_type) VALUES (#{fromTscheNo}, #{toTscheNo}, #{transitType})
mapper.sql: (SELECT CONCAT('http://localhost:9999/menu/', r.rest_thumb) FROM TRAVEL_SCHEDULE_TBL s JOIN RESTAURANT_TBL r ON s.rest_no = r.rest_no WHERE s.tplan_no = tp.tplan_no ORDER BY s.tsche_day_no ASC, s.tsche_order_no ASC LIMIT 1) AS imgName
mapper.select:
SELECT tp.member_no AS memberNo, tp.tplan_no AS tplanNo, tp.tplan_title AS title, tp.tplan_desc AS `desc`, tp.tplan_days AS tplanDays, tp.tplan_like AS tplanLike, tp.tplan_view AS tplanView, tp.tplan_region AS tplanRegion, tp.tplan_total_price AS tplanTotalPrice, tp.tplan_status AS tplanStatus, tp.created_at AS createdAt, GROUP_CONCAT(t.tag_name ORDER BY t.tag_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS tplanTags,
FROM TRAVEL_PLAN_TBL tp LEFT JOIN PLAN_TAG_TBL pt ON tp.tplan_no = pt.tplan_no LEFT JOIN TAG_TBL t ON pt.tag_no = t.tag_no WHERE tp.tplan_status = 1 GROUP BY tp.tplan_no ORDER BY tp.created_at DESC

SELECT tp.member_no AS memberNo, tp.tplan_no AS tplanNo, tp.tplan_title AS title, tp.tplan_desc AS `desc`, tp.tplan_days AS tplanDays, tp.tplan_like AS tplanLike, tp.tplan_view AS tplanView, tp.tplan_region AS tplanRegion, tp.tplan_total_price AS tplanTotalPrice, tp.tplan_status AS tplanStatus, tp.created_at AS createdAt, FROM FAVORITE_PLAN_TBL fp JOIN TRAVEL_PLAN_TBL tp ON fp.tplan_no = tp.tplan_no WHERE fp.member_no = #{memberNo} AND tp.tplan_status = 1 ORDER BY fp.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAVEL_PLAN_TBL SET tplan_view = tplan_view + 1 WHERE tplan_no = #{tplanNo}
mapper.select: SELECT tplan_no as tplanNo, member_no as memberNo, tplan_title as title, tplan_desc as `desc`, tplan_region as region, tplan_days as tplanDays, tplan_total_price as tplanTotalPrice, tplan_view as tplanView, tplan_like as tplanLike FROM TRAVEL_PLAN_TBL WHERE tplan_no = #{tplanNo}
SELECT t.tag_name FROM PLAN_TAG_TBL pt JOIN TAG_TBL t ON pt.tag_no = t.tag_no WHERE pt.tplan_no = #{tplanNo}

SELECT s.tsche_no as tscheNo, s.tsche_day_no as tscheDayNo, s.tsche_order_no as tscheOrderNo, s.rest_no as restNo, r.rest_name as restName, r.lat, r.lng FROM TRAVEL_SCHEDULE_TBL s JOIN RESTAURANT_TBL r ON s.rest_no = r.rest_no WHERE s.tplan_no = #{tplanNo} ORDER BY s.tsche_day_no ASC, s.tsche_order_no ASC
SELECT m.MENU_NO as menuNo, m.MENU_NAME as name, m.MENU_PRICE as price, m.MENU_IMG as imagePreview FROM RECOMMEND_MENU_TBL rm JOIN MENU_TBL m ON rm.menu_no = m.MENU_NO WHERE rm.tsche_no = #{tscheNo}
SELECT transit_type FROM TRAVEL_ROUTE_TBL WHERE from_tsche_no = #{fromNo} AND to_tsche_no = #{toNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FAVORITE_PLAN_TBL WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND tplan_no = #{tplanNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAVEL_PLAN_TBL SET tplan_title = #{tplanTitle}, tplan_desc = #{tplanDesc}, tplan_region = #{tplanRegion}, tplan_days = #{tplanDays}, tplan_total_price = #{tplanTotalPrice} WHERE tplan_no = #{tplanNo}
mapper.select: SELECT P.tplan_no AS tplanNo, P.tplan_title AS tplanTitle, P.tplan_days AS tplanDays, P.tplan_total_price AS tplanTotalPrice, P.tplan_view AS tplanView, P.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAVEL_SCHEDULE_TBL S WHERE S.tplan_no = P.tplan_no) AS restaurantCount FROM TRAVEL_PLAN_TBL P WHERE P.member_no = #{memberNo} ORDER BY P.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
